targets.expr: {job="systemd-journal", unit="xinity-ai-gateway.service"} | json | label_format level=`{{if eq .level "50"}}error{{else if eq .level "40"}}warn{{else if eq .level "30"}}info{{else if eq .level "20"}}debug{{else if eq .level "10"}}trace{{else if eq .level "60"}}fatal{{else}}{{.level}}{{end}}` | line_format `{{if .msg}}{{.msg}}{{else}}{{__line__}}{{end}}`

{job="systemd-journal", unit="xinity-ai-dashboard.service"} | json | label_format level=`{{if eq .level "50"}}error{{else if eq .level "40"}}warn{{else if eq .level "30"}}info{{else if eq .level "20"}}debug{{else if eq .level "10"}}trace{{else if eq .level "60"}}fatal{{else}}{{.level}}{{end}}` | line_format `{{if .msg}}{{.msg}}{{else}}{{__line__}}{{end}}`

{job="systemd-journal", unit="xinity-infoserver.service"} | json | label_format level=`{{if eq .level "50"}}error{{else if eq .level "40"}}warn{{else if eq .level "30"}}info{{else if eq .level "20"}}debug{{else if eq .level "10"}}trace{{else if eq .level "60"}}fatal{{else}}{{.level}}{{end}}` | line_format `{{if .msg}}{{.msg}}{{else}}{{__line__}}{{end}}`

{job="systemd-journal", unit="xinity-ai-daemon.service"} | json | label_format level=`{{if eq .level "50"}}error{{else if eq .level "40"}}warn{{else if eq .level "30"}}info{{else if eq .level "20"}}debug{{else if eq .level "10"}}trace{{else if eq .level "60"}}fatal{{else}}{{.level}}{{end}}` | line_format `{{if .msg}}{{.msg}}{{else}}{{__line__}}{{end}}`
